cards.front: What does the INSERT statement do in a database?
cards.back: Inserts new records into a table

cards.front: What is the purpose of specifying columns in the INSERT statement?
cards.back: To specify the columns in the table where the new record will be inserted

cards.front: What is the syntax for inserting a record into a table?
cards.back: INSERT INTO table_name (column1, column2, ...) VALUES (value1, value2, ...)

cards.front: What happens when you insert a duplicate record into a table?
cards.back: The duplicate record is ignored and the new record is inserted

cards.front: Can you insert a record into a table without specifying the columns?
cards.back: Yes, you can use DEFAULT values or omit the column list to use the default column values
